[{"url": "https://worldbusinessoutlook.com/nippon-steel-announces-major-business-restructuring", "title": "Nippon Steel announces major business restructuring » World Business Outlook", "content": "In a significant move to boost competitiveness and efficiency, Nippon Steel Corporation and its subsidiaries Nippon Steel Metal Products co. ltd., and Nippon Steel Pipe co. ltd. along with wholly owned subsidiary of Nippon Steel Coated Steel Pipe co. ltd. have announced a major business restructuring plan. The reorganization, set to take effect on April 1, 2025, aims to reform the domestic ERW steel pipe business and strengthen its market position.", "score": 0.8047902, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://journal-neo.su/2024/10/10/on-the-political-issues-and-problems-related-to-the-planned-merger-between-nippon-steel-and-us-steel", "title": "Merger of Nippon Steel and US Steel: an important event for the industry", "content": "About

# On the political issues and problems related to the planned merger between Nippon Steel and US Steel

Vladimir Terehov,   October 10, 2024

The proposed merger of the two countries’ leading steel companies has recently become a prominent issue in the complex system of US-Japanese relations.", "score": 0.7728226, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.mesabitribune.com/news/business/u-s-steel-airs-potential-impact-of-merger-failure/article_751fec4a-6ae7-11ef-88a3-fbd763eda377.html", "title": "U.S. Steel airs potential impact of merger failure | Business | mesabitribune.com", "content": "United States Steel Corporation says it would pivot away from blast furnace operations and potentially move its headquarters if its proposed merger with Nippon Steel Corporation fails.

After months of criticism from the United Steelworkers union over the proposed $14.9 billion dollar merger, it’s the first time that the iconic steelmaker has publicly talked about possible impacts should the merger not be approved by federal regulators.", "score": 0.7672197, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://stainless-steel-world.net/nippon-steel-and-nippon-steel-stainless-steel-corporation-merger", "title": "Nippon Steel and Nippon Steel Stainless Steel Corporation merger - Stainless Steel World", "content": "and Nippon Steel Stainless Steel Corporation (NSSC), a wholly-owned subsidiary of NSC, have announced that their respective Boards of Directors, at meetings held earlier in October, resolved to conduct a merger with NSC as the surviving company and NSSC as the dissolving company, effective as of April 1, 2025.", "score": 0.7402687, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://gmk.center/en/news/biden-plans-to-block-the-merger-of-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-bloomberg", "title": "Biden plans to block the merger of Nippon Steel and US Steel - Bloomberg", "content": "In early December, Nippon Steel reaffirmed its confidence that the acquisition of US Steel could be completed by the end of 2024 if the deal goes through the proper procedures and is approved by the Biden administration.

As GMK Center reported earlier, Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, according to Reuters, sent a letter to the US President asking him to approve the deal so as not to harm recent efforts to strengthen ties between the two countries.

Tags:", "score": 0.6816637, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://finance.yahoo.com/news/us-steel-nippon-steel-merger-102356390.html", "title": "US Steel and Nippon Steel merger gains non-US regulator approval", "content": "These approvals from the regulatory bodies mark a crucial step towards the completion of the deal, which is anticipated in the second half of 2024.

The bodies approving the transaction include the Directorate-General for Competition of the European Commission, the Mexican Federal Economic Competition Commission, the Serbian Competition Commission, the Ministry of Economy of Slovakia, and the Turkish Competition Authority.", "score": 0.67758125, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.mining-technology.com/news/us-steel-nippon-steel-merger", "title": "US Steel, Nippon Steel merger gains nod of non-US regulators", "content": "United States Steel Corporation (US Steel) and Nippon Steel have secured all regulatory clearances from jurisdictions outside of the US for their proposed merger.

Burritt highlighted the merger's potential to unite the strengths of both entities, envisioning the emergence of a global powerhouse in steel manufacturing.", "score": 0.5735118, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/trump-biden-oppose-nippon-us-steel-merger-what-vp-harris-position", "title": "Where does VP Harris stand on US Steel-Nippon Steel merger? | Fox Business", "content": ""The partnership with Nippon Steel, a long-standing investor in the United States from our close ally Japan, will strengthen the American steel industry, American jobs and American supply chains and enhance the U.S. steel industry's competitiveness and resilience against China," U.S. Steel's previous statement explained.", "score": 0.55362654, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.pymnts.com/cpi-posts/us-steel-and-nippon-steel-secure-international-approvals-for-14-9b-merger", "title": "US Steel and Nippon Steel Secure International Approvals for $14.9B Merger", "content": "The U.S. Department of Justice is rigorously examining the proposed transaction. [{"url": "https://esmark.com/esmark-inc-and-esmark-steel-group-reaffims-support-for-u-s-steel-merger-by-nippon-steel", "title": "Esmark, Inc. and Esmark Steel Group Reaffims Support for U.S. Steel Merger by Nippon Steel - Esmark Inc.", "content": "SEWICKLEY, PA.; CHICAGO HEIGHTS, ILL.; INDIAN ROCKS BEACH, FLA. – January 14, 2025 – Esmark, Inc. and Esmark Steel Group today reaffirmed their support for the proposed merger between U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel and urges the Trump administration to revisit this alliance. The proposed merger is positioned to bring significant benefits to the combined company’s workers, strengthened U.S. national security, as well as bolstering America’s status in the international steel industry.", "score": 0.89545894, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://investorshangout.com/analysis-of-cfius-review-on-us-steelnippon-steel-merger-172498-", "title": "Analysis of CFIUS Review on US Steel-Nippon Steel Merger", "content": "Published Time: 2025-01-08T12:51:23-05:00 Analysis of CFIUS Review on US Steel-Nippon Steel Merger - Investors Hangout 4. Analysis of CFIUS Review on US Steel-Nippon Steel Merger Analysis of CFIUS Review on US Steel-Nippon Steel Merger Author: Thomas CooperUpdated: 01-08-2025 12:51 PM CFIUS Review of the US Steel-Nippon Steel Merger Recently, U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen addressed the blocked acquisition of U.S. Steel by Nippon Steel, emphasizing the significance of the Committee on", "score": 0.8790744, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.insidearbitrage.com/deal-metrics/X/2888/united-states-steel-to-be-acquired-by-nippon-steel?t=alw", "title": "M&A Deal Metrics for the acquisition of United States Steel by Nippon Steel", "content": "January 6, 2025: U.S. Steel (X) and Nippon Steel filed two lawsuits after President Biden blocked their merger. The first, a court petition filed in the United States Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit, claims that President Biden and CFIUS violated their rights by blocking the transaction without a proper national security review. In the second, U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel sued Cleveland-Cliffs (CLF), its CEO Lourenco Goncalves, and USW President David McCall in the United States District", "score": 0.8708723, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.entrepreneur.com/finance/us-steel-and-nippon-merger-should-investors-bet-on-it/489330", "title": "U.S. Steel and Nippon Merger: Should Investors Bet on It?", "content": "## Latest Status of the Merger Attempt

After Donald Trump won the election, NSC and U.S. Steel focused on negotiating with the Trump administration.
